entry.title: Re: Regex help
entry.content:
Ensure your regex engine supports lookahead assertions (?=...) and then try

 

^(?=.{10,18}$)[A-Za-z]{3,7}\.[A-Za-z]{3,10}$

entry.title: Re: SAP DataSphere and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
entry.content:
Here is the hands-on: https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-DA180?tab=readme-ov-file#da180---explore-sap-datasphere-and-sap-analytics-cloud-end-to-end

If you are looking for theory, then start at https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/data-analytics, where you have get-started learning journeys listed.

entry.title: Re: HANA Stored Procedure - Dynamically assign column nam...
entry.content:
Interesting question @Satheesh9204!

I had to use Dynamic SQL in my approach, although I do not know if this is the most optimal and/or elegant solution.

I simulated your environment using two system tables to read data from `TABLES` and `VIEWS` tables from `TABLE_NAME` and `VIEW_NAME` fields and insert them into a table named `Merge_Table`.

Here is my procedure:

DO BEGIN
    DECLARE CURSOR c_cursor1 FOR
        SELECT
        	"Table_Name",
        	"Field",
        	"Description"
        FROM "v_check_table"
        ORDER BY "RowID";

    TRUNCATE TABLE "Merge_Table";

    FOR cur_row AS c_cursor1
	DO
        EXEC 'INSERT INTO "Merge_Table" ( SELECT '''|| :cur_row."Table_Name" || ''' AS "Field", ' || :cur_row."Field" || ' AS "Code", '''|| :cur_row."Description" || ''' AS "Description" FROM ' || :cur_row."Table_Name" ||' )';
    END FOR;
    CLOSE c_cursor1;
    
    SELECT "Check_Table", count(*) FROM "Merge_Table" GROUP BY "Check_Table";
END;

And the output of its execution:

I hope this helps as a starting point for you,
--Vitaliy 🇺🇦

entry.title: Re: HANA Stored Procedure - Dynamically assign column nam...
entry.content:
And my complete code to simulate the question:

DROP SCHEMA Vital_Sandbox CASCADE;
CREATE SCHEMA Vital_Sandbox;
SET SCHEMA Vital_Sandbox;

DROP TABLE "v_check_table";
CREATE TABLE "v_check_table" AS (
    SELECT 1 AS "RowID", 'TABLES' AS "Table_Name", 'TABLE_NAME' AS "Field", 'System table for Tables' AS "Description" FROM DUMMY
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 2 AS "RowID", 'VIEWS' AS "Table_Name", 'VIEW_NAME' AS "Field", 'System table for Views' AS "Description" FROM DUMMY
);

DROP TABLE "Merge_Table";
CREATE TABLE "Merge_Table" AS (
    SELECT T1."Table_Name" as "Check_Table", T2."TABLE_NAME" AS "Code", T1."Description" AS "Description" 
    FROM "v_check_table" T1 CROSS JOIN "TABLES" T2
    WHERE 1<>1 
);

DO BEGIN
    DECLARE CURSOR c_cursor1 FOR
        SELECT
        	"Table_Name",
        	"Field",
        	"Description"
        FROM "v_check_table"
        ORDER BY "RowID";

    TRUNCATE TABLE "Merge_Table";

    FOR cur_row AS c_cursor1
	DO
        EXEC 'INSERT INTO "Merge_Table" ( SELECT '''|| :cur_row."Table_Name" || ''' AS "Field", ' || :cur_row."Field" || ' AS "Code", '''|| :cur_row."Description" || ''' AS "Description" FROM ' || :cur_row."Table_Name" ||' )';
    END FOR;
    CLOSE c_cursor1;
    
    SELECT "Check_Table", count(*) FROM "Merge_Table" GROUP BY "Check_Table";
END;

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Calculation Views - Graphical vs Directly from Views
entry.content: @ThanhHieuNguyen  But they are not behind the pay wall, you just need to log in to SAP Learning with your user.

entry.title: Re: Troubles connecting to HANA Cloud from BAS
entry.content:
The error message you attached shows an authentication error and the correlation-id.

You (or your DB admin) should check a detailed reason when querying your database with

select * from AUTHENTICATION_ERROR_DETAILS

like:

entry.title: Re: How to get the API Key for S4 HANA Cloud trial (Not for the public sandbox).
entry.content:
I assume you are using a trial version of S/4HANA Cloud Public from https://www.sap.com/products/erp/s4hana/trial.html?

In the FAQ, it says, "The trial system only offers a selected subset of the overall functionality of S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Key user capabilities like ... integration with SAP BTP are not offered in this trial."

entry.title: Re: SAP DATASPHERE HANDSON Course materials
entry.content:
I suggest you start with the SAP Datasphere Basic Trial: https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/datasphere/trial.html and learning journey: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/explore-sap-datasphere

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Regex help
entry.content: Can you mark it as "answered" then @aravind_indu ?

entry.title: Re: Failed to create HDI container on database because of: SAP DBTech JDBC: [1891]
entry.content:
Can you run

call SYS.GET_INSUFFICIENT_PRIVILEGE_ERROR_DETAILS ('<GUID>', ?)

in your database to find the details of the missing authorizations?

entry.title: Re: My AI Highlights of 2024: A Year of Progress
entry.content:
Thank you for sharing this. You mentioned quite a few events that I have missed paying attention to... but should I, if everything is changing that fast?

What I would be more interested in is how your very personal use of AI changed during this year? I obviously saw your posts experimenting with ABAP and SAPGUI but besides that: what have you used, how and for what?

Dziękuję!

entry.title: Re: AI in 2025 - predictions or guessing game
entry.content:
I think at least two more trends started evolving at the end of 2024:

1/ LxMs: Large "something" Models, like Large Reasoning Models, or Large Code Models etc. Question is how much is it a technology trend vs a "differentiate-or-die" marketing trend?

2/ The end of globalization, and a need for the national models. As you may know, Poland invests in PLLuM, and national security - in case someone unplugs you from their commercial model - is one of the main reasons.

Regards,
--Vitaliy

entry.title: Re: Why does the Database User from a SPACE in SAP Datasp...
entry.content:
In SAP HANA database there is a view SYS.AUTHENTICATION_ERROR_DETAILS: https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud-database/sap-hana-cloud-sap-hana-database-security-guide/troubleshooting-authentication-problems

But I am not sure if it is accessible from SAP Datasphere.

entry.title: Re: Python call a store procedure
entry.content: Hi. Could you share how the parameter `sql_statement` looks like in the call of this method?

entry.title: Re: Getting trouble when using TUNNEL Live Connection from SAC to SAP HANA on-premise
entry.content: What version of SAP HANA on-prem do you have? Have you checked https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/live-data-connection-to-sap-hana-using-a-tunnel-connection-with-sap/ba-p/13476308?

entry.title: Re: ABAP LLM Client Beta Release
entry.content: @Cocquerel I think the main difference is that ABAP AI SDK is SAP official software, while this ABAP LLM Client seems to be a community open source.

entry.title: Re: Getting trouble when using TUNNEL Live Connection from SAC to SAP HANA on-premise
entry.content:
If you did everything according to procedure and it does not work, then it is difficult to address this via a community Q&A, unless @quovadis has some suggestions.

You might need some network or security experts from your organization to troubleshoot.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP for developer training
entry.content:
Here is the starter for developers: https://developers.sap.com/mission.scp-1-start-developing.html

Are there any specific services or environments that you are looking for?

entry.title: Re: What's New with SAP Datapshere in Q4, 2024 ✨
entry.content: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zLDecaIZXDY&ab_channel=SAPCommunity

entry.title: Re: How to fix datasphere DATE format for CSV file going to LOCAL TABLE
entry.content: I do not know the full context, but it is quite common to define date format as a string, and then do convertion of dates into the date format in the next step, if possible. Regards.
